description_long: This is a modern bathroom vanity cabinet featuring a rectangular wooden structure with a light natural finish, supported by a black metal frame. On the left side, there are two spacious drawers with long horizontal black handles, while the right side has two open shelves for accessible storage. A white, round vessel sink sits atop the left side of the cabinet, paired with a sleek, tall chrome faucet. The back of the cabinet reveals plumbing fixtures and the internal structure beneath the sink. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A modern wooden vanity cabinet with black metal framing, drawers, open shelves, and a vessel sink with a chrome faucet.
description_view_0: The cabinet is viewed from the side, showing the depth, the vessel sink, and the faucet on top.
description_view_1: The front view displays two drawers with black handles, open shelves, and the vessel sink with faucet.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the full length of the wooden top and the round sink with faucet.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the plumbing under the sink and the open structure of the drawers and shelves.
